name: rAthena Core Server Knowledge Pack
description: Knowledge relating to rAthena core server structure, configuration files, renewal versus pre-renewal settings, and directory trees.

entries.title: rAthena Root Directory Structure
entries.summary: Standard folder structure of an rAthena server.
entries.details: An rAthena server is divided into main directories: 'db/' for server-side databases (YAML and legacy TXT format), 'conf/' for server config files (.conf), 'npc/' for script scripts (.txt), and 'src/' containing C source files compiled into map/char/login server binaries.

entries.title: Renewal versus Pre-Renewal database paths
entries.summary: Path separation in rAthena between Renewal and Pre-Renewal databases.
entries.details: In rAthena, standard databases are stored in 'db/re/' for Renewal mode and 'db/pre-re/' for Pre-Renewal mode. Enabling renewal requires compiling the server with '#define RENEWAL' inside 'src/config/renewal.hpp'. The Agente Setimmo auto-detects this configuration.
warnings: Ensure compilation flags match your active db/re or db/pre-re directories to avoid parameter mismatch warnings.

entries.title: rAthena Import and Customization Directories
entries.summary: Recommended directories for custom modifications in rAthena.
entries.details: Custom databases and overrides should be placed in 'db/import/' (e.g. 'item_db.yml', 'mob_db.yml') and custom scripts under 'npc/import/' or similar imports to avoid merge conflicts when upgrading the base rAthena files. RagnaForge prioritizes importing custom definitions correctly from these directories.
warnings: Adding duplicate IDs inside main and import files without removing the original may throw a duplicate key error during server boot.
